name: S1: add card + celebration animation (NowCard / NowCardStack / MentorCelebration)
description: The S1 Mentor home feed shipped without animations. NowCard.tsx and NowCardStack.tsx use plain View containers with no Animated/Reanimated entering or exiting transitions. MentorCelebration.tsx:29-44 performs a conditional static View swap — alreadySeen=false renders a border-accented card, alreadySeen=true renders a plain card — with no scale, bounce, or burst. The spec's 'joyful bubble motion / warm burst' requirement (s2.1 ch.4, T18/T26) was never implemented. react-native-reanimated ~4.1.6 is already installed and used in AnimatedSplash.tsx (withSpring, useAnimatedStyle), ready.tsx (FadeIn), and consent.tsx (Animated.timing).
acceptanceCriteria:
1. NowCard root View becomes Animated.View (reanimated) with FadeIn.duration(300) entering; onDecline triggers FadeOut or SlideOutUp exiting animation before card is removed from the stack.
2. NowCardStack staggers entering animations: anchor first, each module card delayed ~50ms.
3. MentorCelebration replaces static view-swap with a reanimated scale+fade burst on first render (alreadySeen=false); the already-seen static fallback (testID mentor-celebration-static) remains a plain View.
4. All animations call useReducedMotion() and skip or instant-duration (0ms) when reduced motion is active.
5. Existing NowCard.test.tsx and NowCardStack.test.tsx continue to pass (reanimated mock already in jest setup).
6. MentorCelebration.test.tsx asserts mentor-celebration node is present and onMarkSeen fires on first render; reduced-motion path renders mentor-celebration-static immediately.
riskImpact: The Mentor home screen is the primary daily entry point; no kinetic feedback on card enter/dismiss or celebration moments makes the experience feel flat and breaks the 'joyful' product promise described in the S1 spec.
